---
title: "nitrix.graph"
generated: true
signature-hash: 5ccff9f76bc705d0
description: "Graph-theoretic primitives."
listing:
  id: nitrix-graph-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-graph/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.graph`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Graph-theoretic primitives.

Differentiable operators over graphs and meshes, spanning graph Laplacians,
modularity and community structure, spectral embeddings, and functional
parcellation. Operators are multi-format (dense, ELL, and SectionedELL sparse
storage) wherever the underlying mathematics admits it.

The subsystem is organised into four groups of operators.

Laplacian
    `laplacian`, [`laplacian_matvec`](nitrix-graph-laplacian/laplacian_matvec.qmd), and the degree vectors
    [`degree_vector`](nitrix-graph-laplacian/degree_vector.qmd), [`in_degree_vector`](nitrix-graph-laplacian/in_degree_vector.qmd), and
    [`symmetric_degree_vector`](nitrix-graph-laplacian/symmetric_degree_vector.qmd).

Community structure
    Modularity-related operators: [`girvan_newman_null`](nitrix-graph-community/girvan_newman_null.qmd),
    [`modularity_matrix`](nitrix-graph-community/modularity_matrix.qmd) (dense), [`modularity_matrix_matvec`](nitrix-graph/modularity_matrix_matvec.qmd)
    (sparse-friendly), [`coaffiliation`](nitrix-graph-community/coaffiliation.qmd), and [`relaxed_modularity`](nitrix-graph-community/relaxed_modularity.qmd)
    (dense plus a sparse-aware factored path).

Connectopy
    Spectral embeddings: [`laplacian_eigenmap`](nitrix-graph-connectopy/laplacian_eigenmap.qmd) and
    [`diffusion_embedding`](nitrix-graph-connectopy/diffusion_embedding.qmd), each with both a dense (`eigh`) and a
    sparse (`lobpcg`) solver path.

Parcellation
    Functional-parcellation steps: [`surface_boundary_map`](nitrix-graph-parcellation/surface_boundary_map.qmd)
    (connectivity-profile boundary detection) and [`eta_squared`](nitrix-graph-parcellation/eta_squared.qmd)
    similarity, together with [`mesh_watershed`](nitrix-graph-parcellation/mesh_watershed.qmd) (host-side
    priority-flood basins on a vertex field).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-graph-symbols}
:::
